---
applyTo: "**/*.test.*,**/*.spec.*,tests/**,test/**"
---
# Test Instructions
<!-- DYNAMIC FILE -->

- Every new feature or fix must include a test.
- Tests must be modular — one test per behavior.
- Name tests descriptively: what is tested and what outcome is expected.
- Regressions must be logged in `docs/ai/mistakes.md`.
- Tests must pass before any commit is proposed.
- Never skip or comment out failing tests without logging the reason.
